When is Christmas Day?

Christmas Day is always December 25. In 2026, Christmas falls on a Friday. The countdown above updates automatically based on today's date and counts down to midnight on December 25.

Christmas traditions around the world

Christmas is celebrated on December 25 in most countries. In some Orthodox Christian traditions, Christmas is celebrated on January 7. The countdown above targets December 25 of the current or next year.

Frequently asked questions

How many days until Christmas 2026?

The countdown above shows the exact number of days remaining until December 25, 2026. It updates automatically every time you open the page.

What day is Christmas 2026?

Christmas Day 2026 (December 25, 2026) is a Friday.

What day is Christmas 2027?

Christmas Day 2027 (December 25, 2027) is a Saturday.

How many weeks until Christmas?

The number of weeks until Christmas is shown in the results above. Divide the days by 7 to get the approximate number of weeks.
